counters.description: fair match-up pre level 9 or something around this. later on he can just all-in (+ ghost). his sustain and hp burn make him a champion that cho'gath doesn't like. use your pokes q-w till he is around 40% hp (classic strategy) and after that just go with a full combo to kill him (maybe from bushes for hiding q). "the biggest threat to a darius player is to get cc. poke him, avoid the outer range of his q or fight him right after he uses his q, after that everything becomes easy."
it's winnable, but it takes some strategy to win this match-up.

jhin becomes a problem in late game, when he outscales you (deals around 1000 dmg per hit) and reaches his passive movement speed (with items) that literally allow him to run across your q hit in front of him. also as you grow up you become an easy to hit target by his w (usually you are dead once he hits this) or by his r.

she is a bigger threat as a late game adc rather than facing her top lane (you need 6 and one shot combo). the real problem comes up in late game, when she outscales and kills you easily. probably only by using fog of war you will stand a chance to kill her. if you miss your q in late game 1v1 - you are dead. remember to always use your w if you hit your q, so she can't push you with her e and give herself time for q dashes and kite.

makes you troubles mostly in mid/late game. her movement speed makes her almost unhitable and has an annoying slowness on q. i consider banning her when i am playing mid so she doesn't punish me mid/late game.

lulu's ult makes killing anyone risky as the hp boost might overpower your ult damage, knock back you and insta-kill you. also she can turn you into kitty and interrupt you to protect the adc. sometimes it's good to take her down first instead of adc during 1v2 laning phase and just fall back with just one kill.

beside his stun which is easy to hit you because of your size and his outranging you, he has passive with +% health bonus damage and 99% times he builds liandry making huge damage on your 5000 k hp. you can use q when he's using q to try to stop his full combo.

he hits you easily because of your raising size constantly stunning you. his movement speed is good and his reviving ultimate doesn't give you stack (if you eat someone who is ulted by him). during laning phase i wouldn't save feast for him (happened to me to play vs him on mid) but stack on minions or roam other lanes with it, because he is either unreachable or will use his ultimate.

i would recommend to ban her if you're playing bot lane for fun (adc/supp role). as mid laner she isn't such a big threat - i mean you have to either be stupid to die 1v1 as she rather pokes, or just can die to gank if she stuns you.
high mobility, dodges, dashes and invisibility + clone on passive. w is your most powerful ability here. note that luckily lb's clone gives you permanent stack (advanced feast info).
similar to vel'koz but a bit more annoying. xerath pokes and keeps save distance especially with e.
you can try killing him pre-3 before he gets his q stun especially that you have strong level 2 kill potential.
cho's w silence is the fundament in this case, but not gonna lie, happened to me a lot, that even his dash was faster than cho's w animation.

synergies.description: perfect combo on your q.
rakan's knock up and ulti charming groups enemies in close distance for enough time to hit q w combo easy and destroy them all.
nice front line tank in team for team with ap cho + very nice combo - link to the example video: https://youtu.be/79htmmghsp0

perfect cc combo, very nice and effective to play with. if he stuns you can easily q. if you q first it's even better for jhin who can hit w stun and get a lot of movement speed to catch the target. plus his ultimate also closes the target's possible ways to dodge your q and slow the enemy on each hit, so it's easier to catch food or you hit q and jhin gets easy r hits.
combo of destruction with her q e r!
generally everything she gives!
frontline + rammus q + rammus e gives you always enough time to have free q knock-up and full combo. ganks are so easy to comp and get kills!ns if possible with q.
zyra's e either stuns enemy or slows enemy, both give cho great q follow-up knock-up!
with his good r you just need to be around ready for free q and w on as many oponents he stunned and it is pretty much a won team fight.
warwick has fear and stun on r. if he ganks and hits one of those, you can hit your q easily and kill the enemy.
you know that if cho'gath grows, he gains aa range? the vorbal spikes get even more impressive!
morgana's e gives you cc protection which can be useful sometimes. her 3 seconds stun on q gives you a lot of time to hit your q and maybe kill the enemy as well.
when she hits her w roots for 1.25-2.25 seconds so you have easy q hit. her camouflage on e will hide your q animation.
either you hit q and blitz has easy grab or blitz hits e or q and you have even easier q knock-up, simple but works.
anything that gives you movement speed to catch your food is nice + her ultimate with your q combo.
his w almost perfectly fits your q = free hit, especially if one of you hits the stun already.
care for her q dash not to knock enemies off your q zone. besides good ultimate combo and front line.
front line and stuns work well with cho.
great frontline and his w slow makes your target kinda impossible to miss cho's q! easy to gank with!
he has 2 cc and gives you movement speed to put e slow on running enemy.
both q stuns and her e upgrades your 3 aa which pretty much works well with your e ability.
your q + her q
jarvan's ultimate perfectly fits your q and w size.
priceless for late game team fights. when malphite hits his r - you can easily hit your q and w and kill them all.
her charming gives you enough time to hit your q when she ganks, usually resulting wtih a ree kill.
his ult gives you some time to land your q w combo.
combo q with her q/w/r
you might wonder sometimes when playing with pyke where did the feast stack go. it's gone. ;-;

rakan's knock up and ulti charming groups enemies in close distance for enough time to hit q w combo easy and destroy them all.
